title: Kiwi Paintings
description: Replaces the vanilla painting textures with Kiwi's cute paintings. It's that simple and hope you will like it.
body:
# Kiwi Paintings 🥝
✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧
![Kiwi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88f0939b408945634804701435c2c1ca44231549_0.webp)
✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧✦✧
##  📖 Introduction
This pack replaces vanilla paintings' textures with a selection of Kiwi's pictures, and it can be fun and surprising when you place the paintings.

##  📷 Features
- Supports versions 1.21.x and below
- Vanilla borders and backs
- 64x for better clarity
- No impact on FPS

##  📃 Statement
- While this pack is made for entertainment, please do not steal or modify the textures.
- In the future, it's planned to add a pack compatible with version 26.1.
- Due to my earlier inexperience, the previous version numbers are confusing and cannot be changed, which may cause you some inconvenience. I will fix this in future versions.
- If you encounter any errors or bugs with my pack or want to consult more, please email me at **kiwi11560@outlook.com** or send me a private message on Bilibili, **Asher_2026**. _(I am a student, so sometimes my response time may be slower, but I will do my best to solve problems, thanks!)_

**That's all. Thank you for downloading my first resource pack! ˙ᵕ˙**
